inline_comments.message:
it is better to have separate tests, one with rest params=null and another with db params=null.

in addition, the purpose of this test originally was to verify validation of a sub-structure (e.g., rest params). I'd rather see the original test retained.

as it is, I don't see how this change would increase code coverage.

Let's retain the original test. And utilize the test added below, which only addresses the missing setName() line to be covered. That test can be enhanced to check for null values to cover remaining lines of code.
